details: repo_structure: reports/board/ was missing. Remediated by creating the directory during this run.
no_deprecated_dirs: moltbot/ directory still exists at repo root. This is a deprecated directory that should have been removed or archived.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory contains active Python modules (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports directly from moltbot package. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot removal in docstrings (documentation, low severity). Excluded from anomaly: reports/audit/*, docs/*, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py (governance checker itself), scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py (check name reference only).
